clientId.title: Client ID
clientId.description: The OAuth client ID for OpenAI Codex API. A default is provided from Codex CLI.

model.title: Model
model.description: The OpenAI Codex model to use for generating responses

config.edited: OpenAI Codex settings have been updated
config.notEdited: Failed to update OpenAI Codex settings

texts.aboutApiSettings: Configure your OpenAI Codex OAuth settings. Click "Get Authorization URL" to start the OAuth flow, or expand Advanced Settings to enter tokens manually.
texts.oauthStep2: Open the URL in your browser and authorize
texts.oauthStep3: Copy the redirect URL from your browser after authorization
texts.oauthStep4: Paste it below and click "Exchange Token"
